summary: Bulk Create Action Plan Item Assignees

parameters.name: completion_mode
parameters.description: Whether to update what can be or nothing if one can not be updated. Defaults to "all_or_nothing"

status.description: status of the update on that Item

plan_item_id.description: Action Plan Item ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

is_holding.description: Indicates whether or not the Action  Item Assignee's signature is holding

party_id.description: Party Person ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

role.description: Role of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set

verification_method_id.description: Verification Method ID of the Action Plan Item Assignee to be set
